// about_me

Who I Am

Recently completed my BSc Honours in Information Technology at Chinhoyi University of Technology. I specialise in deep learning, autonomous AI agents, and penetration testing — building systems that think, adapt, and protect.

Krimson Tech — Brand & Startup

I actively create educational tech content across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, and LinkedIn under Krimson Tech, bridging cutting-edge AI research and real-world implementation for a growing online community.

TikTokYouTubeInstagramLinkedIn
Current Focus

Currently participating in the Matsuo Lab (GCI World) AI Research Programme (2026 cohort) and scaling freelance software services through Krimson Tech.

// featured_projects

What I've Built

From award-winning AI systems to agentic automation engines — a selection of projects showcasing my depth across AI, security, and full-stack development.

🎓 Final Year Capstone

Nexus Guard AI / NetPatrol

Automated IT Risk Management System

Final-year capstone featuring a neural anomaly detection engine and an agentic security intelligence layer. Combines deep learning threat modelling with autonomous response capabilities for enterprise network protection.

PythonTensorFlowAgentic AINetwork SecurityDeep LearningFastAPI
View on GitHub
🥇 1st Place — NESARI ZIE 2025

AI Network Monitoring System

Real-Time Anomaly Detection Platform

Co-developed an award-winning deep learning system detecting and flagging network anomalies in real-time. Combines live traffic analysis, pattern recognition, and a responsive admin dashboard.

Deep LearningPythonReactWebSocketsNetwork AnalysisDashboard
View on GitHub
⚡ Agentic AI System

AI Desktop Automation Agent

Self-Hosted Autonomous AI Gateway

A self-hosted AI gateway integrating local LLMs (via Ollama) with a Telegram bot and autonomous desktop control on Ubuntu. Engineered WebSocket pipelines for real-time agentic command execution.

PythonOllamaTelegram APIWebSocketsUbuntuAutomation
View on GitHub
🚀 CUT Technofest 2024

Dynamic Weather Dashboard

Live Weather Intelligence App

Built solo during the CUT Technofest Hackathon 2024. Features live data integration, location-based forecasts, and a polished reactive UI with real-time updates via ReactJS and public Weather APIs.

ReactJSWeather APIGeolocationCSS3REST APIData Viz
View on GitHub
